description_long: This is a medium-sized disposable cup with a dark gray plastic lid and a vibrant, multicolored exterior. The cup's body is adorned with swirling, abstract patterns in shades of pink, red, purple, yellow, and white, giving it a lively and artistic appearance. The lid features a raised drinking spout and a recessed area for sipping, typical of takeaway coffee cups. There are visible printed elements, including text and possible branding, on one side of the cup. The cup appears to be made primarily of paper or cardboard with a plastic lid, and it is likely intended for hot beverages. Its overall form is tapered, wider at the top and narrowing toward the base, with a smooth, hard surface finish.
description: A colorful, patterned disposable cup with a dark gray plastic lid and swirling abstract designs, likely used for takeaway beverages.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cup's lid, drinking spout, and the most detailed area of decorative swirls and visible text.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the continuous abstract swirl pattern with less visible text and more focus on the artwork.
description_view_2: The back view displays the lid's spout from a different angle and additional branding or logo elements on the cup's surface.
description_view_3: This view reveals a barcode, more printed text, and a partial view of the decorative pattern, with the lid's edge visible.
